programs.program_course_name: Postgraduate Diploma in Creative Arts Therapy
programs.campus_location: Manukau Campus, Christchurch Campus, Wellington Campus
programs.academic_requirements: Applicants must hold an undergraduate diploma or degree qualification equivalent to NZQF Level 7. Provide evidence of academic writing ability that reflects the potential for successful study at the graduate level.
programs.india_qualification: Indian equivalent: Applicants must hold an undergraduate diploma or degree qualification equivalent to NZQF Level 7. Provide evidence of academic writing ability that reflects the potential for successful study at the graduate level.. Indian students should provide transcripts from a recognised Indian university or board (CBSE/ICSE/State board) showing the equivalent standard.

programs.campus_location: Auckland City Symonds Street, Wellington, Christchurch
programs.academic_requirements: Applicants must have a recognised Bachelor degree in Information Technology (or equivalent) with a B average in the final year or a Bachelor Honours degree in Information Technology (or equivalent), or a Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology (or equivalent) followed by relevant professional experience, or demonstrated equivalent practical, professional and/or scholarly experience – entry at the discretion of the Programme Head.
programs.india_qualification: Indian equivalent: Applicants must have a recognised Bachelor degree in Information Technology (or equivalent) with a B average in the final year or a Bachelor Honours degree in Information Technology (or equivalent), or a Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology (or equivalent) followed by relevant professional experience, or demonstrated equivalent practical, professional and/or scholarly experience – entry at the discretion of the Programme Head.. Indian students should provide transcripts from a recognised Indian university or board (CBSE/ICSE/State board) showing the equivalent standard.
